title: Complete a full in-game cycle from role generation to game over
description: Verifies the leader can run all major game phases end-to-end and reach a game over outcome from an active room with enough players.

steps.description: Set the room max players to a value of at least 6
Verify the in-game phase view is displayed and the user can advance through phases until a game over view is shown

title: Start a game only when at least six players are present
description: This test verifies the leader can start the game only after adding at least six players and the room transitions into the first in-game phase.

steps.description: Click to create a new room
Fill a unique game name into the game name field
Select a valid max players value
Fill a valid display PIN value into the display PIN field
Open the newly created room from the active games list
Add a player via the manual add player form using the name Player 1
Add a player via the manual add player form using the name Player 2
Add a player via the manual add player form using the name Player 3
Add a player via the manual add player form using the name Player 4
Add a player via the manual add player form using the name Player 5
Add a player via the manual add player form using the name Player 6
Verify the room is in the role generation phase

title: Create a new game room and see it in the active games list
description: This test verifies a leader can create a room with game name, max players, and display PIN and the room appears in the active games list.

steps.description: Click to create a new room
Fill a unique game name into the game name field
Select a valid max players value
Fill a valid display PIN value into the display PIN field
Verify the new room appears in the active games list

title: Assign roles to players to proceed from role generation to role binding completion
description: Verifies the leader can assign roles during role binding and successfully proceed to the next phase.

steps.description: Set the room max players to a value of at least 6
Assign roles to all players using the role binding UI
Verify the day discussion phase is displayed

title: Manage lobby players: add, rename, and remove a player
description: This test verifies a leader can add a player in the lobby, rename the player, and remove the player with the lobby updating accordingly.

steps.description: Click to create a new room
Fill a unique game name into the game name field
Select a valid max players value
Fill a valid display PIN value into the display PIN field
Open the newly created room from the active games list
Add a player via the manual add player form using the name Player One
Rename the player to Player One Renamed
Remove the player from the lobby
Verify the player grid does not include the removed player

title: Run night actions and view sequential morning recap reveals
description: Verifies the leader can execute night actions and then step through morning recap reveals in sequence.

steps.description: Set the room max players to a value of at least 6
Advance phases until night is active
Complete the available night action steps
Advance through the recap reveals one by one
Verify the morning recap reveals update sequentially as the leader advances them

title: Admin can log in successfully
description: Verifies an admin can log in with valid credentials and land on the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: View activity details with financials, tables, and linked room summary
description: Verifies an admin can open an activity detail view and see financial and attendance summaries plus the linked room and location info, with bookings and costs tables accessible.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Click an activity card to view its details
Verify the financial summary donut chart and attendance distribution chart are displayed
Verify the linked game room summary and location information are displayed

title: Leader can log in and land on the leader interface
description: This test verifies a leader can log in with valid credentials and is redirected into the leader interface.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the leader interface

title: Operate day discussion speaker queue with a timer and proceed to voting
description: Verifies the leader can run the day discussion speaker queue with timing controls and then proceed to the voting phase.

steps.description: Set the room max players to a value of at least 6
Advance phases until day discussion is active
Advance to the next speaker in the queue
Stop or reset the speaker timer
Verify the day voting phase is displayed

title: Admin can create a new activity
description: Verifies an admin can create a new scheduled activity with required fields and see it appear in the activities list.

steps.description: Click to open the activities section from the admin dashboard navigation
Click to add a new activity
Select a valid date and time for the activity
Select a location from the location dropdown
Fill Activity Alpha into the description field
Verify the new activity appears in the activities list

title: Create a paid booking for an activity
description: Verifies an admin can create a booking for a selected activity with a payment amount and see it appear in the bookings list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Select an activity from the activity dropdown
Fill Booking Test Paid into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill 4 into the people count field
Fill a valid payment amount into the payment amount field
Verify the new booking appears in the bookings list

title: Resolve voting without a tie and proceed to night actions
description: Verifies the leader can run day voting through justification and then proceed to night when there is no tie condition.

steps.description: Set the room max players to a value of at least 6
Advance phases until day voting is active
End voting and proceed to justification
Proceed from justification to the next phase
Verify the night phase is displayed

title: Return to session lobby after game over
description: Verifies the leader can finish a match, see a winner at game over, and return to the lobby to run another session.

steps.description: Set the room max players to a value of at least 6
Advance phases until game over is reached
Return from the game over view to the session lobby
Verify the room lobby is displayed and is ready for a new game

title: Unlink a game room from an activity
description: Verifies an admin can unlink the linked game room from an activity and the activity no longer shows a linked room afterwards.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Click an activity card to view its details
Click the control to unlink the linked game room
Verify the activity no longer shows a linked game room card

title: Display shows voting results and morning recap as they are revealed
description: Verifies the display updates to show voting results and night recap reveals during a live match.

steps.description: Enter a room code or PIN
Wait for the match to progress to a voting or recap moment
Verify voting results are displayed when voting completes and recap reveals appear as they are advanced

title: Admin can edit an existing activity
description: Verifies an admin can edit an existing activity and see the updated values reflected in the activities list.

steps.description: Click to open the activities section from the admin dashboard navigation
Click to add a new activity
Select a valid date and time for the activity
Select a location from the location dropdown
Fill Activity To Edit into the description field
Open the options for the newly created activity
Change the base price to a different valid value
Verify the activities list shows the updated activity information

title: Lock an activity from the details page
description: Verifies an admin can lock an activity and the UI reflects that the activity is locked.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Click an activity card to view its details
Verify the activity is shown as locked
Verify editing controls that should be restricted are disabled or hidden

title: Resolve a tied vote using tie-breaker and proceed to night
description: Verifies the leader can enter the tie-breaker flow when votes tie and then proceed to the night phase.

steps.description: Set the room max players to a value of at least 6
Advance phases until day voting is active
Trigger the flow that proceeds to tie-breaker for a tied vote
Complete the tie-breaker and proceed to the next phase
Verify the night phase is displayed

title: Edit an existing booking
description: Verifies an admin can update booking details and see the booking list reflect the updated information.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Select an activity from the activity dropdown
Fill Booking Test Edit into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill 3 into the people count field
Select the booking that was just created
Fill Booking Test Edit Updated into the name field
Fill 5 into the people count field
Verify the booking list shows a booking with name "Booking Test Edit Updated"

title: Join a room on the display and see player/game state render
description: Verifies the display operator can join with a room code or PIN and see player cards and current game state displayed.

steps.description: Enter a room code or PIN
Verify player cards are displayed and the current game state view is shown

title: Create a new staff member with roles
description: Verifies an admin can add a staff member, assign roles, and see the staff member in the staff list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to staff management
Click the add new staff member action
Fill Staff Test User into the name field
Fill staff.test.user@example.com into the email field
Select at least one role for the staff member
Verify the staff list includes "Staff Test User"

title: Create a location with offers and see it listed
description: This test verifies an admin can create a new location with at least one offer and the new location appears in the locations list afterward.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to locations management
Click to add a new location
Fill a unique location name into the location name field
Fill valid location details into the remaining required fields
Add an offer to the location and fill valid offer details
Verify the new location appears in the locations list

title: Join as a player using a room code and see confirmation
description: Verifies a player can enter a room code and name on the join page and receive a successful join confirmation.

steps.description: Click the link to join a room as a player
Fill "Test Player" into the player name field
Verify a join confirmation is displayed

title: Create a free booking for an activity
description: Verifies an admin can create a free booking for an activity and see it appear as a booking in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Select an activity from the activity dropdown
Fill Booking Test Free into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill 2 into the people count field
Verify the new booking appears in the bookings list

title: Admin can delete an activity with confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can delete an activity after confirming and the activity is removed from the activities list.

steps.description: Click to open the activities section from the admin dashboard navigation
Click to add a new activity
Select a valid date and time for the activity
Select a location from the location dropdown
Fill Activity To Delete into the description field
Open the options for the newly created activity
Verify the deleted activity no longer appears in the activities list

title: Display rejoin after refresh restores a usable session view
description: Verifies the display can recover from a page reload by re-entering room code or PIN and returning to a consistent game view.

steps.description: Enter a room code or PIN
Enter the room code or PIN again
Verify the display returns to showing the current room state

title: Edit a location’s details and see the update reflected
description: This test verifies an admin can update an existing location’s details and the locations list reflects the changes.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to locations management
Click to add a new location
Fill a unique location name into the location name field
Fill valid location details into the remaining required fields
Select the newly created location from the list
Edit the location name to a new unique value
Verify the updated location entry is shown in the locations list

title: Navigate from landing page to leader entry point
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the landing page to the leader area and reach the leader login or leader dashboard.

steps.description: Click the leader interface entry option
Verify the leader login page or leader dashboard is displayed

title: Delete a location and confirm it is removed
description: This test verifies an admin can delete a location and it no longer appears in the locations list after confirmation.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to locations management
Click to add a new location
Fill a unique location name into the location name field
Fill valid location details into the remaining required fields
Select the newly created location from the list
Verify the deleted location is not present in the locations list

title: Use display match replay controls to view a past match
description: Verifies the display operator can enter replay mode and use replay controls to navigate through a past match timeline.

steps.description: Enter a room code or PIN
Use replay controls to move to a different point in the replay timeline
Verify the displayed game state updates to reflect the selected replay point

title: Navigate from landing page to admin login
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the landing page to the admin panel login page.

steps.description: Click the admin panel entry option
Verify the admin login page is displayed

title: Edit a staff member profile and roles
description: Verifies an admin can update an existing staff member’s details or role assignments and see changes reflected in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to staff management
Click the add new staff member action
Fill Staff Test Edit into the name field
Fill staff.test.edit@example.com into the email field
Select at least one role for the staff member
Select the staff member "Staff Test Edit" from the list
Fill Staff Test Edit Updated into the name field
Verify the staff list includes "Staff Test Edit Updated"

title: Add multiple offers to a location and verify they persist on edit
description: This test verifies an admin can add multiple offers to a location and they remain present after saving and reopening the location for editing.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to locations management
Click to add a new location
Fill a unique location name into the location name field
Fill valid location details into the remaining required fields
Add a first offer to the location and fill valid offer details
Add a second offer to the location and fill valid offer details
Select the newly created location from the list
Verify multiple offers are displayed for the location

title: Prevent joining when room code is missing or invalid
description: Verifies the join flow blocks submission for a missing or invalid room code and shows an on-page error state.

steps.description: Click the link to join a room as a player
Fill "Test Player" into the player name field
Verify an invalid-code error is visible and the join is not confirmed

title: Delete a staff member
description: Verifies an admin can delete a staff member after confirming and the staff member is removed from the staff list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to staff management
Click the add new staff member action
Fill Staff Test Delete into the name field
Fill staff.test.delete@example.com into the email field
Select at least one role for the staff member
Select the staff member "Staff Test Delete" from the list
Verify the staff list no longer includes "Staff Test Delete"

title: Prevent joining when player name is missing
description: Verifies the join flow blocks submission without a player name and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Click the link to join a room as a player
Leave the player name field empty
Verify a required-field validation error is visible and the join is not confirmed

title: Activity creation validates required fields
description: Verifies the activity form shows a validation error and does not create an activity when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Click to open the activities section from the admin dashboard navigation
Click to add a new activity
Leave at least one required field empty
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Booking form validates required fields
description: Verifies the booking form prevents submission when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to activities
Verify required-field validation errors are visible
Verify the booking is not created and the form remains open

title: Admin sees error on invalid credentials
description: Verifies an admin sees an invalid-credentials error when attempting to log in with a wrong password.

steps.description: Fill invalid-admin@example.com into the username field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Prevent saving a location when required fields are missing
description: This test verifies the location form blocks submission when required fields are missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to locations management
Click to add a new location
Leave at least one required field empty
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Display join rejects an invalid room code or PIN
description: Verifies entering an invalid room code or PIN prevents joining and shows an on-page error state.

steps.description: Enter an invalid room code or PIN
Verify an invalid-code error is visible and the display does not enter the room view

title: Leader sees an error on invalid login credentials
description: This test verifies a leader entering invalid credentials is not logged in and sees an invalid-credentials error.

steps.description: Fill invalid-username into the username field
Fill invalid-password into the password field
Verify an invalid-credentials error is visible
